regional_cost_note: Builders in Rotorua typically charge $80–$115/hr. New build costs range $2,600–$3,800/m². Rotorua’s geothermal activity can affect foundations; local builders are well versed in site requirements.

businesses.name: Russell Builders Ltd
businesses.known_for: NZ-qualified Licensed Building Practitioner with over 16 years of experience in new builds, renovations, insurance work, plastering, and bathroom/kitchen upgrades.

businesses.name: Pereeti co
businesses.known_for: 15 years of industry experience specialising in earthworks, retaining walls, fencing, decks, concrete services, and demolition across the Bay of Plenty and Waikato.

businesses.name: BOP Renovations
businesses.known_for: Full-service renovation company handling architecture & design, demolition, earthworks, flooring, roofing, waterproofing, and painting & decorating.
